notes: Ollama Cloud models invoked via the `ollama launch codex` shim.
Uses `codex exec --json --ephemeral` with full autonomy flags.
Per-model `command_prefix` replaces the default `codex` leader so the harness routes through Ollama Cloud.

models.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) via Codex
models.selection_reason: Best Kimi model on Ollama Cloud through Codex CLI — pairs with the Claude Code Ollama Cloud harness for cross-runner comparison.

models.selection_reason: Best Qwen model on Ollama Cloud via Codex — reasoning and agentic tool use.
